sentences.target: Ich überweise die Gebühr gleich nach der Arbeit.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ʔyːbɐˈvaɪ̯zə diː ɡəˈbyːɐ̯ ɡlaɪ̯ç naːx deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t/

translations.de: Ich überweise die Gebühr gleich nach der Arbeit.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ʔyːbɐˈvaɪ̯zə diː ɡəˈbyːɐ̯ ɡlaɪ̯ç naːx deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t/
translations.en: I’ll transfer the fee right after work.
translations.es: Haré la transferencia de la tasa justo después de salir del trabajo.
translations.fr: Je ferai un virement pour les frais juste après le travail.
translations.it: Farò il bonifico della tassa subito dopo il lavoro.
translations.zh-Hans: 我下班后马上把费用转过去。
translations.yue: 我收工之後就即刻轉錢去交費。
translations.ru: Я переведу деньги за пошлину сразу после работы.
translations.pt: Vou fazer a transferência da taxa logo depois do trabalho.
translations.he: אעביר את התשלום עבור האגרה מיד אחרי העבודה.
translations.tr: Ücreti işten sonra hemen havale edeceğim.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ chuyển khoản phí ngay sau giờ làm.
translations.nl: Ik maak de leges meteen na het werk over.
translations.uk: Я перерахую збір одразу після роботи.
translations.hu: A díjat közvetlenül munka után átutalom.
translations.hi: मैं काम के तुरंत बाद फीस ट्रांसफर कर दूंगा.
translations.el: Θα κάνω μεταφορά για το τέλος αμέσως μετά τη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Jeg overfører gebyret rett etter jobb.
translations.id: Saya akan mentransfer biaya itu langsung setelah kerja.
translations.sv: Jag för över avgiften direkt efter jobbet.
translations.ro: Voi transfera taxa imediat după serviciu.
translations.cs: Poplatek pošlu převodem hned po práci.
translations.da: Jeg overfører gebyret lige efter arbejde.
translations.ja: 仕事のあとすぐに手数料を振り込みます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative 1st person singular; verb-second position; transitive, taking 'die Gebühr' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiners the direct object 'Gebühr'.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as the direct object of 'überweise'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates immediacy.
Preposition governing dative; heads the PP 'nach der Arbeit'.
Definite article, feminine singular dative; determiner for 'Arbeit' within the PP headed by 'nach'.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'nach'.

sentences.target: Die Gebühr zahlst du am Schalter.

translations.de: Die Gebühr zahlst du am Schalter.
translations.en: You pay the fee at the counter.
translations.es: Pagas la tasa en la ventanilla.
translations.fr: Tu paies les frais au guichet.
translations.it: La tassa si paga allo sportello.
translations.pt: Você paga a taxa no balcão.
translations.nl: De leges betaal je aan het loket.
translations.hi: फीस काउंटर पर जमा की जाती है.
translations.el: Το τέλος το πληρώνεις στο γκισέ.
translations.ja: 手数料は窓口で払います。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular accusative (form identical to nominative); determiner of topicalized object 'Gebühr'.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as fronted direct object.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; verb-second position; takes 'Gebühr' as direct object and 'am Schalter' as locative PP.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject placed after the verb due to V2 and object topicalization.
Contraction of the preposition 'an' + definite article 'dem'; introduces a dative PP indicating location.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'an' (via 'am').

sentences.target: Für die Gebühr habe ich keine Quittung.
sentences.reading: /fyːɐ̯ diː ɡəˈbyːɐ̯ ˈhaːbə ɪç ˈkaɪ̯nə ˈkvɪtʊŋ/

translations.de: Für die Gebühr habe ich keine Quittung.
translations.ipa: /fyːɐ̯ diː ɡəˈbyːɐ̯ ˈhaːbə ɪç ˈkaɪ̯nə ˈkvɪtʊŋ/
translations.en: I don’t have a receipt for the fee.
translations.es: No tengo recibo de la tasa.
translations.fr: Je n’ai pas de reçu pour les frais.
translations.it: Non ho la ricevuta della tassa.
translations.ru: У меня нет квитанции за пошлину.
translations.vi: Tôi không có biên lai cho khoản phí đó.
translations.nl: Ik heb geen kwitantie voor de leges.
translations.uk: У мене немає квитанції за збір.
translations.hi: उस फीस की रसीद मेरे पास नहीं है.
translations.el: Δεν έχω απόδειξη για το τέλος.
translations.nb: Jeg har ikke kvittering for gebyret.
translations.id: Saya tidak punya kuitansi untuk biaya itu.
translations.sv: Jag har inget kvitto för avgiften.
translations.da: Jeg har ikke kvittering for gebyret.
translations.fi: Minulla ei ole kuittia siitä maksusta.
translations.ja: その手数料の領収書はありません。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing accusative; heads the fronted PP 'Für die Gebühr'.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Gebühr' as object of 'für'.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as complement of the preposition 'für'.
Finite lexical verb (not auxiliary here), present indicative 1st person singular; expresses possession; verb-second position.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'habe'.
Negative determiner/article modifying 'Quittung'; feminine singular accusative.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as the direct object of 'habe'.

sentences.target: Die Gebühr tut mir echt weh.

translations.de: Die Gebühr tut mir echt weh.
translations.es: Esa tasa me duele de verdad.
translations.ru: Эта пошлина сильно бьёт по карману.
translations.vi: Khoản phí này thật sự đau ví.
translations.nl: Die leges doen echt pijn in de portemonnee.
translations.uk: Цей збір реально б’є по кишені.
translations.hi: ये फीस सच में बहुत चुभती है.
translations.pl: Ta opłata mocno uderza po kieszeni.
translations.el: Αυτό το τέλος ματώνει την τσέπη.
translations.ja: この手数料は本当に痛い。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; determiner of the subject 'Gebühr'.
Common noun, feminine; nominative singular as clause subject.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; main verb in the fixed expression 'tut ... weh' ('wehtun').
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; experiencer/indirect object of 'tut ... weh'.
Degree/intensifying adverb modifying the predicate ('tut ... weh').
Separable verb particle forming the compound verb 'wehtun' with 'tut'; yields the meaning 'to hurt'.
